stimulus:
Welcome! In this study, you will play three short video games, completing a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

response: {"creativity-rating":1,"creativity-free-response":"There really wasn't anything to it, maybe I just didn't understand what I was supposed to do, but all I did was click to make the moth move and when I tried to take it to those dots that randomly appeared, nothing happened, so there wasn't really a point or motivation to play it.","originality-rating":2,"originality-free-response":"I think it's not very original, it's similar to quite a lot of games. I guess the concept of directing a moth using light makes it a little unique, though. Nothing felt surprising or stood out to me ","effectiveness-rating":2,"effectiveness-free-response":"I think at the begining it was nice to try and explore what needed to be done etc but there isnt much too it so eventually it felt kind off long ","authenticity-rating":3,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":2,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"I just think there isnt much too it, the idea is very basic it needs like a goal"}

response: {"creativity-rating":4,"creativity-free-response":"I think its quite creatiive, havent seen or heard of anything similar before","originality-rating":3,"originality-free-response":"The idea that you go towards the circles and match their beats to eat them is cool, its kind off like pac man anf those music games so im not sure if its super original its like a mix of different games","effectiveness-rating":4,"effectiveness-free-response":"Its pretty enjoyable and it gets challenging as you progress which helps make it more fun","authenticity-rating":3,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":4,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"I think the game developer had some intresting ideas but got inspiration from previous popular games and put their own twist to it"}

response: {"creativity-rating":4,"creativity-free-response":"Its something different that I havent seen before","originality-rating":4,"originality-free-response":"I think the concept of moving the surroundings to accommodate the square is unique.","effectiveness-rating":3,"effectiveness-free-response":"It was enjoyable but I think the intructions need to be a bit clearer ","authenticity-rating":4,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":4,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"It felt genuine, I havent seen this type of concept before"}
